case_title: OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MAYRA A ANGELONES PANDURO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-23-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OMAR OSORIO--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOVEMBER-23-2015 BY PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. NOT REPORTED. PRO TEM JUDGE MARK MURRAY; CLERK M.L.MANZELLA (DEPT. 506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT ANGELONES PANDURO, MAYRA A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
